best_rules_serialized.description: Captures sequences of initial-dot-space-initial-dot patterns.

best_rules_serialized.name: Names after 'Rechtsanwalt' or 'Rechtsanwältin'
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures names following legal profession titles, ensuring no trailing space and handling initials with dots.

best_rules_serialized.name: Full names with titles (corrected)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures full names preceded by titles like Dr., Prof., ensuring the entire name is captured including middle initials, excluding the title itself.

best_rules_serialized.name: Anonymized names with ellipses (space)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures anonymized names with a letter and ellipsis (e.g., 'K …', 'T …', 'A …', 'R …').

best_rules_serialized.name: Names after 'Herr' or 'Herrn' (corrected)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures names following 'Herr' or 'Herrn', handling full names and initials.

best_rules_serialized.name: Names after 'Richter' or 'Richterin' (corrected)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures names following 'Richter', 'Richterin', 'Vorsitzender Richter', etc., ensuring no trailing space.

best_rules_serialized.name: Names after 'Angeklagte' or 'Angeklagten' (corrected)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures names following 'Angeklagte' or 'Angeklagten', ensuring no trailing space and handling initials with dots.

best_rules_serialized.description: Captures sequences of initial-dot-space-initial-dot patterns.

best_rules_serialized.name: Anonymized names with dots and ellipses or spaces
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures anonymized names with dots and ellipses or spaces (e.g., 'K …', 'H …'), excluding company names.

best_rules_serialized.name: Initials after legal roles
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures single letter initials (with or without dots) following legal role indicators like 'Angeklagten', 'Kläger', 'Zeuge', 'Zeugin'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Anonymized initials with dots (e.g., R., A.)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures anonymized initials with a trailing dot (e.g., 'R.', 'A.', 'B.') to ensure the dot is included in the entity, excluding common non-name words.

best_rules_serialized.name: Compound surnames
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures specific known German compound surnames (e.g., Lachenmayr-Nikolaou, Sost-Scheible) while excluding geographical or technical terms.

best_rules_serialized.name: Initials with surname (e.g., K. Schmidt)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures an initial followed by a capitalized surname, ensuring it's a name and not a sentence start or common verb.

best_rules_serialized.name: Initials with dots (e.g., K., T.)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures single letter initials followed by a dot, ensuring the dot is included.

best_rules_serialized.name: Initials with surname (corrected)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures patterns like 'K. Schmidt' or 'M. P. Borom' where an initial (with dot) is followed by a surname.

best_rules_serialized.name: Names with specific formatting (BRADLER , Christian)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures names with specific formatting like 'BRADLER , Christian' or 'Surname , Firstname', excluding non-name patterns like 'BMW, Typ' or 'BGH, Beschluss'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Initials with surname
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures patterns like 'K. Schmidt' or 'M. P. Borom' where an initial (with dot) is followed by a surname.

best_rules_serialized.name: Names after legal roles (Herr, Richter, etc.)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures names following legal role indicators like 'Herr', 'Herrn', 'Richter', 'Richterin', 'Angeklagte', 'Angeklagten', 'Kl\u00e4ger', 'Zeuge', ensuring no trailing space and handling titles correctly.

best_rules_serialized.name: Initials with surname (contextual)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures an initial followed by a capitalized surname (e.g., 'K. Schmidt'), ensuring it's a name and not a sentence start or common verb.

best_rules_serialized.name: Anonymized names with comma and initial
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures anonymized names in the format 'Surname , Initial.' (e.g., 'Boolell , M.', 'Rosen , R. C.').

best_rules_serialized.name: Multi-initial names with surname
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures names with multiple initials followed by a surname (e.g., 'P. W. McMillan', 'Tomlinson , J. M.').

best_rules_serialized.name: Known German Surnames
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures a comprehensive list of common German surnames and other frequently occurring names in legal texts, including compound names.

best_rules_serialized.name: Anonymized initials with dots (corrected)
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures anonymized initials consisting of a single uppercase letter followed by a dot, ensuring it's not part of a larger multi-initial sequence already captured.

best_rules_serialized.name: Anonymized initials with dots
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures anonymized initials (e.g., 'J.', 'K.') ONLY when preceded by a role indicator or title, preventing false positives on legal abbreviations like 'S.' or 'V.'.

best_rules_serialized.name: Anonymized single letters
best_rules_serialized.description: Captures single letter anonymized names (e.g., 'A', 'B') ONLY when preceded by a role indicator or title, preventing false positives on section markers like 'I.', 'II.' or abbreviations.
